pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Secret Bear 1000%
pageContext.description: What secrets are to be unlocked with this adorable new Care Bear?  Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Secret Bear 1000% Collectible Figure! From American greeting cards to the bright television screens in our homes, Care Bears have found a way to spread their love and happiness to friends around the world for generations.   Standing at approximately 27.5 inches tall, this lovely and bright Be@rbrick is just waiting to be taken by your hand!  Care Bears fans, be sure to add the Secret Bear to your collection today!
